name: Dragon Ball Super Card Game
description: In the Dragon Ball Z trading card game, each player builds a deck of cards featuring their favorite characters from the popular anime series, and then uses those cards to battle each other in a strategic game of wits and power. The goal of the game is to reduce the other player’s life points to zero by attacking their characters with your own cards, and defending your own characters from attacks. The cards in the game feature various characters from the Dragon Ball Z universe.
creator: MasterV2
